signals.headline: NO recent breaking news confirmed about Cooper Flagg joining the Lakers, Cavaliers, or Raptors
signals.raw:
NO recent breaking news confirmed about Cooper Flagg joining the Lakers, Cavaliers, or Raptors.**[1][2][3]

Flagg, the 2025 NBA Draft's No. 1 overall pick, was selected by the **Dallas Mavericks** and signed a four-year rookie contract worth approximately $62.7 million (with $28.3 million guaranteed), as announced by the team.[1] He has been performing strongly in his rookie season with Dallas, in
